title: 日本ダービーの後に・リフレクト

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I heard her voice while I was running.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: DEEERRRBYYY!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I can't count how many times all her silly yelling
has cheered me up.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But today, it terrified me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Why isn't anything working? Why can't I...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but... I wasn't good enough—I lost.

She's quiet again, and I'm not quite sure what to
say.

Before I can think of something, a voice cuts
through the air.

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Winning Ticket!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wait, aren't you with...

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I'm with the Winning Step Weekly!
Do you have some time for an interview?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sure, I don't mind! Sorry I kept turning you down!

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Oh no, not at all! So tell me, how did you feel
about the Derby?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I loved it. All that excitement and cheering? It was awesome! I felt like I was in a dream... But you know what?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It was even better than a dream!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: ...Even though I lost.

text_block_list.name: Magazine Reporter
text_block_list.text: Well, there's always next time...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it's okay. I tried my best. Winning the
Derby's been my dream for so long, and I trained
as hard as I could for it.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob... I did it all for the sake of winning this race! I really wanted to win!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list: Let's head back to the waiting room.
Let's head back to the waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sure...

Biwa Hayahide doesn't utter a word when she
returns to the waiting room.

She's just as crestfallen as she was at the Satsuki
Sho...
choice_data_list:
Do you remember what happened at the Satsuki
Sho?

text_block_list.text:
Her shoulders jump. It appears she does, and she
appears deep in thought about something.
choice_data_list: What have you been thinking about since then?
What have you been thinking about since then?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sometimes, it's like you can read my mind...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You always know what I'm thinking about, down
to the exact moment.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I run, my head spins with images of
future losses.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I've lost twice now. Once to Taishin at the Satsuki
Sho, and again to Ticket at the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
We planned for so many scenarios and tried to
anticipate so many variables. But they just have
something I lack.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm scared. I don't know what that something is, but if it's not just an oversight... If it's something I'm intrinsically missing, then beating them is impossible.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But I—
choice_data_list: We'll find out what's different about them.

text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is extremely smart. Smart enough
to figure out most things on her own.

It's why she always tries to solve everything alone,
even when facing an insurmountable challenge.
But sometimes, she needs a bit of guidance.
choice_data_list: Why not try copying their strengths?
Why not try copying their strengths?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
The most fundamental way to learn is through
imitation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I get what you're saying, but they both have
completely different strengths. During races
they're—
choice_data_list: Okay, but what are they like outside of races?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Outside of races?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Before the Satsuki Sho, I thought Taishin's drive
was amazing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I thought same thing about her before the Derby.
Her drive astounded me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I don't know why I thought that though...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I tried my best. Winning the Derby's been my
dream for so long, and I trained as hard as I could
for it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yes... Both of them have the iron will to improve.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They have the willingness to do whatever it takes,
even if it breaks them.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Going forward, don't be afraid to push me to my limits. In fact, I want you to make me work harder.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My body can handle the pressure. I'm stronger
than I was as a child.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I don't ever want to taste defeat again, and to
ensure that I don't, I need to push myself harder!

Even after we return from the Tokyo Racecourse
to the academy, her resolve remains steely.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I won't ever lose again!

And so, with a determination bordering on
obsession...

Biwa Hayahide sets her sights on the final race of
the Classic Triple Crown tour—the Kikuka Sho.
